description: A vendor has sent a notification that they have changed banks and their payment details need to be updated.

nodes.task_description: Receive the notification of the change in banking details from the vendor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the new banking information.

nodes.task_description: Perform a callback to a known contact at the vendor to verbally confirm the change request and prevent payment fraud.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully contacts the vendor and confirms the change is legitimate.

nodes.task_description: Update the banking information in the vendor master file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the vendor's payment details.
